infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow BloomAR to access your camera to scan flowers and visualize bouquets in AR.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow BloomAR to save and export your bouquet designs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow BloomAR to save bouquet images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AR features require location for environment mapping and accurate placement.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow BloomAR to access your camera to scan flowers and visualize bouquets in AR.
